content: هُوَّ طَلَب إنّ أَعَزِّل وَأَعِيش مَعَه في شَقَّتِه
translations: eng:he asked me to move in and live with him in his flat

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa talab 'inn|i 'aAazzil wa 'aAeesh maA|uh fi sha''it|uh
